result.stdout:
Usage: fflow  <command> [options]

CLI tooling for FFlow — a lightweight, fluent .NET workflow automation framework
built for CI/CD, DevOps, and backend orchestration.

Commands:
  doctor        Run diagnostics on the FFlow CLI environment.
  init          Interactively initializes a new FFlow workflow project.
  run           Runs a C# file inside the official .NET 10 SDK Docker container.

Options:
  --help, h       Show help information.

commands.payload:
Usage: fflow  <command> [options]

CLI tooling for FFlow — a lightweight, fluent .NET workflow automation framework
built for CI/CD, DevOps, and backend orchestration.

Commands:
  doctor        Run diagnostics on the FFlow CLI environment.
  init          Interactively initializes a new FFlow workflow project.
  run           Runs a C# file inside the official .NET 10 SDK Docker container.

Options:
  --help, h       Show help information.

Usage: fflow run  [options]
